title: Glass Meridian Vendor Integrity Inquiry · 72-hour triage
summary: A synthetic inquiry preserving source custody, competing explanations, chronology, AI-workspace risk, bounded disclosure, and encrypted replay without making identity, intent, or truth determinations.
